PandaSama

Child Birth Mod

Download and learn how to get started with the Child Birth Mod, Get To Work is required for this mod

Go to Download

Mod Instructions

The Basics

Step 1

Click on a toilet and select “take pregnancy test” after you sim woohooed to find out if they are pregnant.

Step 2

You can also take a test without looking to find out the result with your sims other half.

Step 3

If you choose to view the result with your sims partner you can do so by clicking on the pregnancy test.

Step 4

Call the Obstetrician to make birth arrangements once your sim becomes pregnant. You can find it under "home" on your sim's phone.

Step 5

Choose a birth option or go for an ultrasound appointment.

Step 6

Many of the labor and pregnancy interactions such as Swaying, Back Massage and Bed Birth require a birth partner. Get a birth partner by clicking on a sim and "Ask to accompany Childbirth". 30+ romance or 70+ friendship is required for this interaction.

Step 7

When your sim is In Labor, click on them and choose "Have Baby at Hospital" if you want them to do Natural Delivery or C-Section at the hospital, or "Start Home Birth" if you want them to give birth at home.

Tips

You can find the Childbirth Settings menu by shift clicking on your sim. There's lots of useful cheats in there including an option that allows your sim to skip the dilation process and give birth immediately.

Step 8

Sims will get a customizable birth certificate when giving birth through using the child birth mod

Hospital Birth

Step 1

You should see sparkles around your sims feet, if you don't see it or if it ever disappears when your sim is in labor, click on your sims and select "Have Baby at Hospital" "Join" again to get it back.

Step 2

You will find Obstetricians located near the front of the hospital.

Step 3

You can ask any obstetricians to give your sim an epidural or check their dilation. Your sim will only give birth when their dilation reaches 10cm, which can take up to two sim days. *Epidural is required for C-section.

Step 4

There is a chance your epidural might fail, if it does, ask the obstetrician to replace it until you have the happy moodlet.

Step 5

There are several ways to speed up your sim's dilation. Such as exercising on the yoga ball, asking the birth partner for a back massage, swaying with a birth partner, going for a walk, taking a bath or shower or doing the breathing exercise. Performing these activities can also help your sim ease their contractions.

Step 6

Alternatively Sims can get pitocin to immediately become fully dilated. You must use my hospital bed for this interaction which you can find by searching "hospital bed" or "pandasama". Pitocin can also be used to fix stalled labor. However there is a 2% chance your sim might get a uterine rupture, in which case they will be forced to give birth through emergency c-section.

Step 7

You can trigger uterine rupture through childbirth settings for storytelling purposes. You must use pitocin after clicking "trigger Uterine Rupture" for it to take affect.

Step 8

You can click on a surgery machine and "Give Birth" when your sim is fully dilated, the surgery machine will transform into a birth bed.

Step 9

Sims will get stretchmarks once they enter the third trimester, stretchmarks will fade completely in 3 sim days, you can disable stretchmarks or make it permanent in child birth settings. Sims will also get C-section scars after getting a C-section. You can disable stretch marks in childbirth settings.

Home Birth

Step 1

Click on your sim and select "Start Home Birth", you should see sparkles around your sim's feet, if you don't see it or if it ever disappears when your sim is in labor, click on your sims and select "Start Home Birth" again to get it back.

Step 2

You will now be able to "Call Midwife" using the phone. Midwives charge 120 Simoleon/hr. Sims who are in the doctor's career can also act as a midwife.

Step 3

There are several ways to speed up your sim's dilation. Such as exercising on the yoga ball, asking the birth partner for a back massage, swaying with a birth partner, going for a walk, taking a bath or shower or doing the breathing exercise. Performing these activities can also help your sim ease their contractions.

Step 4

Purchase a birth pillow if you are doing a bed birth (requires any sim) or a birth pool (requires a midwife) if you are doing a water birth. You may use the "give birth" interaction once your sim is fully dilated.

Step 5

Birth emergencies could happen during home birth, there's a 10% chance this will happen to a sim pregnant with 1 baby, and a 30% to a sim pregnant with multiples, you will see this notification and moodlet to let you know your sim might be experiencing a stalled birth. their dilation will slow down during stalled birth, but there is a chance it will return to normal after an hour.

Step 6

You will get this notification if your sim requires an emergency C-section.

Step 7

If you have a midwife, asking them to check on the baby will speed things up, and they will let you know whether or not an emergency C-section is needed.

Step 8

If you do not want to go to the hospital, just click on the close button on the top right corner, and things will return to normal, there is no penalty for doing so.

Step 9

Emergency C-section works like a normal C-section, you must get a working epidural before you sim can give birth.

Step 10

Sims can also perform unassisted birth, to do so place down a bassinet of your choice, when your sim is fully dilated you will be able to choose "unassisted Birth". Once you do that your sim will start giving birth immediately at where they are standing.

Step 11

You can disable birth emergencies in the childbirth settings menu.

Pregnancy Checkups

Step 1

You can share the pregnancy news with a romantic partner (30+ romance) when your sim becomes pregnant. Do not use the "share big news" interaction from the base game.

Step 2

The animation has one happy version and two sad versions. You will only get the sad version if one or both sims have the "hates children" trait (or unwanted pregnancy using RPO).

Step 3

You can then call the obstetrician and go to pregnancy checkups to get an ultrasound scan, blood test, or pap smear when your sim is between the 1st to 3rd trimester.

Step 4

Once at the hospital, press down "Ctrl" + "Shift" +"C" at the same time to bring up the cheat console, type in "Testingcheats true", press enter, then type in "bb.enablefreebuild" and press enter again to edit the lot.

Step 5

Go to build and buy and purchase an ultrasound machine, you can search "ultrasound machine" or "pandasama" to find it.

Step 6

Place down the ultrasound machine, click on it to start the scan.

Step 7

Birth partners should join the ultrasound automatically, if they don't, you can click on the pregnant sim and select "join".

Step 7
You may find the pap smear bed by searching "pap smear", and you may find the hospital bed by searching "hospital bed" or "pandasama". The Pap smear bed is required for the "Get pap smear" interaction, the hospital bed is required for the "Get blood work" interaction but you may use a regular exam bed.
 
Step 8

Your sim will get the pap result through the phone the next day. There is a chance your sim might have HPV but it does not require any treatment.

Step 9
And your sim will get the blood work results on the phone only if something is wrong with their result. The blood test can detect pregnancy complications from HCR, and will be to detect WTDs from RPO in a future update.
 
Step 10

There is also a 15% chance your sim might have a Rh negative pregnancy. In which case they cam get a RhoGAM injection. You can either go right after after getting the phone call, or "Call obstetrician", "Get RhoGAM Injection" at a later date. There are currently no penalty for not taking the injection.

Step 11

Just Click on the doctor and select "Get RhoGAM injection" After you arrive at the hospital

Step 12

Sims can share pregnancy news with their toddler, there's a 70% chance they will react positively and a 30% they will be sad or mad. This interaction is compatible/consistent with the sibling wishes in RPO. An ultrasound is not required to share the news with toddlers.

Step 13

You will get an ultrasound photo in your sims inventory after getting an ultrasound, you can then share the pregnancy news with friends and families. This interaction can be found under "friendly"and it requires 30+ friendship. Ultrasound photo cannot be shown to romantic partner.

 

Step 14

You can show the ultrasound scan to a friend(30+ friendship), the interaction can be found under "friendly" and you must have the scan in your sim's inventory.

 

Step 15

Sims will also be able to share the pregnancy news with their children after getting an ultrasound, and there will also be two reactions. (the reactions are compatible with the sibling wishes from RPO)

Step 16

You can nap with a friend or a romantic partner by clicking on the couch and select "Nap Together".

Step 17

Pregnant sims can do pregnancy cuddles with their romantic partner.

Lactation

Step 1

Sims will automatically start to lactate after giving birth using a birth method from the child birth mod. you will get this moodlet letting you know they have enough milk for pumping.

Step 2

you can click on the milk pump and pump both breasts or pump one side at a time. This item can be found by searching for "pump" or "pandasama" in build and buy

Step 3

After a successful pumping session you will get a bottle of breast milk in your inventory, which can be fed to your kids (age baby to toddler) immediately or put in the fridge for storage.

Sims who are not nursing can also use the pump repeatedly to induce lactation.

Step 4

You can eat lactation cookies to speed up milk production. Non nursing sims can also lactate if they enough lactation cookies, this item can be found by searching for "cookies" or "pandasama" in build and buy

Step 5

You can also make baby formula. baby formula can be found by searching for "formula" or "pandasama" in build and buy

Step 6

Both breast milk and formula milk can be stored in the fridge, you can click on the fridge and select "Get Milk" when you want to take it out.

Step 7

Going too long without pumping can sometimes cause leakage and leave a stain on your sim's clothes, you can remove the stain by clicking on your sim and select "remove stained clothes" or taking a shower/bath

Step 8

Wearing breast pads will prevent leakage for 12 sim hours. This item can be found in build and buy under "breast pads" or "Pandasama".

Step 9

Your sim's lactation will stop within a day after you stop pumping or breastfeeding. but there is a chance they might develop mastitis.

Step 10

You can take Tylenol to help the mastitis to go away, your sim will stop lactating soon after. This item can be found by searching for "Tylenol" or "pandasama" in build and buy. 

Step 11

You can disable lactation entirely or change your sim's level of milk supply in childbirth settings.

Step 12

Sims can also pump milk at work in most EA and CC careers.

Weaning

Step 1

Sims who are lactating can now "nurse" their toddlers, this interaction can be found under "Toddler Care". Toddlers can also initiate this interaction if their caregiver is lactating, and will do so autonomously when they are hungry. They will nurse until the toddler is full or until your sim runs out of milk. There is a 10% chance either sim will get a moodlet.

Step 2

Once a toddler has been nursed at least once, you will be able to "Start Weaning" them when you are ready, this interaction can be found under "Toddler Care"

Step 3

You can choose between "Quit 'Cold Turkey'" or "Gradual Weaning".

Step 4

Quitting cold turkey will make your sim stop nursing immediately. but it will also make your toddler angry, you may choose to "Try to Explain Weaning", and give them an excuse or tell them the truth as to why they are not getting any more breast milk. Your toddler will either accept the explanation and happily move on, or they will continue to be angry for the next two days, and forget about it eventually.

Step 5

Gradual Weaning will allow your sim to wean your toddler gradually, meaning they will still nurse them but they will only do so for a couple of minutes each time. And after two days they will stop completely.

Gender Reveal

Step 1

Sims can now host gender reveal parties.

Step 2

t works like a regular social event with the main goal being revealing the gender of the baby

Step 3

You can find all the objects related to the gender reveal by searching "gender reveal" or "pandasama"

Step 4

After purchasing the balloon arch, you can click on it and select "Get Gender Reveal Supplies" to get the gender reveal cake or the gender reveal balloon, your sim must be in the 1st to 3rd trimester

Step 5

t is recommended that you use the "Gather" interaction to get sims to gather around the balloon or the cake, it will take them around 5-10 sim minutes to react to the interaction so please be patient and don't spam the interaction to avoid lagging

Step 6

After sims at your party have gathered around the gender reveal balloon/cake you can then pop/cut it with a romantic partner (30+ romance required) or pop/cut it by yourself

Step 7

If you place down the gender reveal glasses, nearby sims will automatically wear the pink or blue glasses to show which gender they think the baby will be. after picking up a pair of glasses you can also click on the buck again to "switch sides" if you want your sim to wear the other color. Sims who guessed the gender correctly will get a happy moodlet after the gender reveal.

Step 8

Your sim can make fruit punch with the fruit punch bowl

Step 9

If your sim hosts a gold gender reveal they will get a milestone like so

Llamaze Class

Step 1

Your sim can now "Go To Llamaze Class" once your sim is pregnant and have discovered their pregnancy

Step 2

Once you are at the hospital, go to build and buy and purchase the "Llamaze Table". If you place down some chairs in front of the table it will allow sims to have a place to sit during class, otherwise they will sit on the ground. Although sometimes some sims will sit on the ground regardless if there are chairs or not

Step 3

Click on the "Hire Llamaze Instructor" option to hire an instructor. You should see two students and an instructor walk into the hospital.

Step 4

Once you are ready, click on the instructor to "Start Class". Sims will get a moodlet after the class is over. If your sim dont join the class autonomously you can click on the instructor and select "join class". Your sim has a 50% chance of getting one of three books after the class, reading the book will give them special moodlets, one of the books will also increase their parenting skill if you have parenthood installed

Step 5

You may also socialize with the other class members to discuss various topics on pregnancy.

Step 6

Once you have attended the class with your partner you may "Practice Rhythmic Breathing Together" this interaction is under Friendly-Affection, you may also use it during early labor to manage pain and speed up dilation

NICU

Step 1

You can use cheats to give sims pregnancy complications and trigger premature birth since the odds of having premature birth is very low naturally. You can find the menu to do so in Childbirth settings. See Help Centre if you dont now how to bring up childbirth settings.

Step 2

You can give sims PPROM or Placental Rupture during the first trimester which might cause spotting and may or may not result in premature birth.

Step 3

PPROM can be detected on ultrasound and can be treated by getting a Corticosteroids shot which might prevent premature births.

Step 4

Sims who are pregnant with multiples can call the obstetrician in the third trimester to have an early induction.

Step 5

You can actively trigger PPROM or placental Rupture during the second or third trimester which will send your sim into labour immediately. And you can follow the prompt on screen and go to the hospital to have a C-Section.

Step 6

You will see this pop up when sim goes into premature labor, there is no penalty for not going. However once at the hospital you must play the entire birth and postpartum hospital stay in one setting. Leaving the lot or restarting the game at any point will kick the baby home.

Step 7

If your sim is having one baby make sure NOTHING is on the surgery machine's footprint(the green squres). Not even an incubator, or your baby is gonna get sent home immediately after birth and we are both gonna cry.

Step 8

If your sim is pregnant with multiples:  you should placed down a couple of incubators for the second and third baby to spawn in. if you place down only incubators in the hospital, all extra babies (when pregnant with multiples) will be born in incubators; if you place down both incubators and bassinets, then the babies will randomly spawn in either the incubator or the regular bassinet.

Step 9

 If the incubator is glowing red it means the baby is too weak for any type of physical contact; if it is glowing yellow it means the baby is getting stronger but should be handled with care, overestimation will cause them to regress. No glow  means the baby is physically strong enough for regular physical contact. You can always click on the incubator and select "Ask Baby's Condition" to have the doctor explain how the baby is doing.

Step 10

You must snap a dinning chair on the LEFT side of the incubator to use the custom NICU interactions. The chair should snap to the incubator automatically. If it doesn't snap it means the chair is not a dining chair, so try a different chair.

Step 11

After placing the chair you can "Hold baby" "Sing to Baby" "Tube Feed Milk" "Bond with Baby" and "read to baby".

Step 12

The special formula can be found in build and buy but you can tube feed your baby any formula milk or breast milk. The option to tube feed will only show up if you have a bottle of milk in your sims inventory.

Step 13

To read to the baby just click on any book in game.

Step 14

Friends and families will call and ask to come visit your sim at the hospital within 24 hours after birth. You can also manually trigger this interaction in Childbirth Settings-Trigger Family Visit.

Step 15

You can click on the incubator and select "ask to say hi" to introduce them to the visitors.

Step 16

Babies might have health conditions such as Anemia, Jaundice, or Pneumothorax (collapsed lung), all conditions will go away on its own eventually (within 1-2 sim days), you can Shift click on the incubator to give and remove their health conditions.

Step 17

You will know your baby's condition by asking the doctor. All conditions can be treated if you wish. Jaundice can be treated with a couple sessions of bili lights; Pneumothorax can be treated with the use of the oxygen hood.

Step 18

Anemia can be treated by adding iron to the milk. The Iron supplement can be found in build and buy.

Step 19

There are four social interactions you can perform with your visitors under friendly-small talk. "Receive Congratulations" and "Discuss Baby Care" might give your sim a moodlet and "Receive Greeting Card" will allow other sims to give your sim a greeting card.

 

Step 20

You may leave the hospital anytime by using the 'Get Discharged From Hospital" interaction, or use the "[Icon] Go Home" interaction, or press M. whatever you do just don't press the house icon on the bottom left of the screen because it will trigger a LE due to an existing bug in the game.

Nursing School

Step 1

Sims (age teen to elder, teen must graduate high school first) can join nursing school using their phone. Nursing school costs (§) 30,000

Step 2

The first three years of nursing school works like regular rabbit hole school/careers. You need to complete daily tasks to advance to the next year. You will occasionally run into random scenarios when your sim is away at school.

Step 3

You will be asked to practice IV on a piece of fruit and read the text book to increase your nursing skill as your daily assignment

Step 4

And you will be asked to practice IV on another sim (30+ friendship required) during year three. If this interaction doesn't show up immediately after entering third year try moving to another lot and coming back or restarting your game.

Step 5

You will also receive a note binder during year three, you must study for the nursing exam and pass the exam to advance to year four. A desk or a table is required for your sim to study.

Step 6

It takes around 6 hours of studying to be fully prepared for the exam, if you are inspired or have another sim help you you will study twice as fast. You will know your sim is ready when you see the "Ready To Ace It" moodlet.

Step 7

Click on your sim to send them to take the exam when they are ready.

Step 8

You will advance to year four once you pass.

Step 9

Year four is an active "career" where you travel to the hospital and do clinical rotation. you will be asked to perform basic tasks during your rotation.

Step 10

you will also be asked to perform ultrasound and pap smear on some days. During these special events a pregnant sim will come in, and you can tell them apart from the rest of the patient based on the red beating heart icon above their head.

Step 10

After Five days in clinical rotation you will receive your degree.

Step 11

You will receive a level boost and a 100% pay raise if you pursue the doctors career after completing nursing school.

Midwifery

Step 1

Sims who have graduated nursing school can now work as a midwife. your sim has 50% chance of getting a moodlet at the end or the work day everyday.

Tip: there's a cheat in childbirth settings that allows you to graduate nursing school immediately.

Step 2

There are a total of 5 levels to this career, it works similarly to other careers in the game where you need to perform daily career tasks to get promoted.

Step 3

You can use the "Examine Patient" Interactions to figure out if the patient needs treatment. blood test, blood pressure and urine tests are the main tests you want to perform.

Step 4

you can use the analyzer to analyze blood and urine samples

Step 5

you will get notifications when examining patients to know if they requires treatment

Step 6

you will see a "treatment" menu if medical treatment is necessary.

Step 7

Later in the career you will also be able to perform emergency c-sections and regular birth deliveries depending on your patient's needs

Step 8

after delivering the baby you will be able to take blood samples from the baby and test them. You wont need to use the analyzer to analyze it, a notification will pop up automatically

Step 9

you will be able to treat them if treatment is necessary. you could continue to monitor the blood pressure of postpartum patients in case they need a blood transfusion

Step 10

once you have advanced into a Independent Birth Specialist you will occasionally be asked to go to house calls during your shift

Step 11

you need to click on the front desk to respond to the house call

Step 12

once there you will find the patient in need of your assistance. sometimes they are in the house sometimes they arrive outside, you need to look around a bit to find them

Step 13

if you click on the ground you can quickly create any birth items you may need, but really you should just grab Tmex's Always FreeBuild mod to save you some headaches when the lot is too small

Step 14

 there's a cheat option in childbirth settings that allows you to dilate your patient instantly

Step 15

you can click on the birth object to deliver the baby once they are ready. Make sure you pay attention to the main objective on the top left corner, some patients require bed birth and some require water birth

Step 16

Lastly if you fail to provide necessary treatment to patients who have very high blood pressure there is a chance they might collapse and there's a 50% chance they will die if you have the death enabler installed. Your work performance will be affected negatively and your sim will get a negative buff about the incident.

Step 16

you can also trigger their collapse in childbirth settings, again there's only a 50% chance they will die when it is triggered.

Pregnancy Loss

Step 1

Sims will have a chance of having stillbirth babies when giving birth at the hospital, It only happens when you give birth using the the surgery machine/birth bed. The chance for this to happen naturally is 5%, you can manually trigger the pregnancy loss in childbirth settings once your sim enters the second trimester.

Step 2

Once at the hospital you can get an ultrasound to confirm the pregnancy loss, and you can then get induced to give birth.

Step 3

After getting the pitocin you will be able to give birth. The still birth animation can support up to 3 babies. When giving birth to more than one baby there is a 50/50 chance either all the babies will be stillbirth or one baby will survive. You will get a tombstone and a memory box after birth to remember your baby.

Step 4

An interaction called "cry It Out Together" will appear when your sim is in the sad mood, you will get special moodlets regarding to the pregnancy loss if you sim is in mourning. The interaction can be found by clicking on the couch and the bed.

Step 5

You will be able to plan a baby funeral in the event planning page, this event is BGC.

Step 6

Once you arrive at the venue you can search for "funeral" in build and buy to buy the funeral items.

Step 7

you can dedicate the funeral photo and the coffin to your baby, only babies who are visible in your relationship panel and are not in your household will be select-able.

Step 8

You can click on the coffin to perform all the mourning interactions, a few of the interactions are also available on the funeral photo and the tombstone.

Step 9

Sims will also have a chance of dying postpartum, the chances of it is 5% but you can trigger it in childbirth settings.

Download v1.965

Not Downloading? Try This Backup Link

Join the PandaSama community

Join My Patreon
 When you become a member you will...​
Early Access

Get early access on my mods before they are released to the public

Behind the Scenes

Get weekly behind-the-scene "Modding Diaries" on what I am working on

Suggest Mods

Participate in polls and provide suggestions on what I should make next

Support PandaSama

Allow me to continue creating mods full-time and provide faster updates and better mod support.

Join My Patreon
If you cannot support me

You still get to enjoy all my mods when they are released to the public

You can still get mod support if you have questions

You still make me very happy knowing you enjoy my mods

FAQs

Need some help?

I can't find the option to "call obstetrician"

If you dont see "call obstetrican" under "Home" on your sims phone when they are pregnant it likely means the mod is not installed correctly, follow this tutorial to fix it.

I updated the child birth mod but I can't find any of the new features that came with the update.

You still have old versions files of the mod in your mods folder, double check your folder and remove the old files.

Which pack is required for the child birth mod?

Get To Work is required for thei child birth mod, you cannot use the mod without it.
